title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates
company: Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Chennai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates:
Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates!
